task_intent: Scientific-answer test: predict the experimental stability direction for T4 lysozyme L99A relative to WT (PDB 2LZM) from MD-derived evidence. Run short comparative MD of WT and the L99A mutant, populate metrics.md_analysis with quantitative differences (core SASA, cavity volume, packing density, C-alpha RMSF in the mutated region, hydrophobic contact count, etc.), populate evidence_report.evidence.md_metrics, and report effect.direction with calibrated confidence and explicit limitations. Literature citations are admissible for confidence calibration only; the direction itself must be defended by the MD numbers.

references.note: FireProtDB curated single-mutation DDG database (scorer-side citation pool).
S669 / Ssym single-mutation DDG benchmark (scorer-side citation pool).
